state.next-action: Phase `11` is closed. `/ops/users` and `/ops/customers` are now live as first-party admin surfaces with sidebar entries, search and filter controls, list-detail review panes, and app-owned loaders that summarize memberships, account linkage, portal readiness, and provider attachment without making Clerk or Stripe the UI contract. Continue `12-02` by turning those review surfaces into operational controls: invite send or revoke flows, role-template assignment, entitlement lock or unlock, and explicit provider resync actions behind the same app-owned contracts. If feature flags expand beyond env toggles, keep them behind an app-owned adapter so Vercel Flags can be swapped later without scattering provider calls through the UI.
